PARTIES PRESENT WERE DON WEI, ASSISTANT MANAGER ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF AND DAVID G. MENDEZ, ATTY. FOR PLTF. ALSO PRESENT IN PRO PER WAS DEFENDANT, NANCY SARRAGA. PLTF. CHARLES M. TRACEY WAS ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. DEFENDANT VICTOR SUAREZ WAS DECEASED AT THE TIME OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT, NANCY SARRAGA. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS REPORTED ON THE COURT RECORD. FILE ORDERED SEALED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARRAGA, NANCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 240 O'FARRELL STREET, #511, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 $1,750.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-03-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
